meta.title: Starship Flight 4 PRE-LAUNCH PARTY Q&A!!!
meta.description:
Welcome to our PRELAUNCH PARTY and Q&A! Starship's 4th full stack flight test is currently no earlier than June 6th at 7:00 a.m. [12:00 UTC], but until then, we'll give you a rundown on what to expect and help answer questions leading up to this historic launch!

This is the 4th fully integrated full stack test flight of Starship and the mighty Super Heavy booster, the largest and most most powerful rocket to ever fly. It produces over twice as much thrust as the Saturn V that took humans to the moon. 

The goal of the test is to get further along than IFT-3 in March, 2024 which made it through stage separation but and second stage burn, but didn't manage to softly splashdown ship or booster. 

If all goes well, Starship will re-enter in the Indian Ocean 90 minutes after it lifts off from Starbase, TX,. This would allow the teams to test the reentry profile and heat shields for the second time from near orbital velocities, hopefully staying in proper orientation and making through reentry in one piece. 

Want a rundown on the hardware and mission changes between flight 3 and flight 4? I've got you covered! - https://youtu.be/O5GY7_aVBtk?si=DK_k03JLpcU7y30d

Want more information? Check out our Prelaunch Preview and preflight check list! - https://everydayastronaut.com/starship-super-heavy-flight-4/

Want to know where to watch this live? I made a video on how to visit Starbase and where to watch a launch from - https://youtu.be/aWvHrih-Juk

Learn more about Everyday Astronaut Mission Control by Guinn Partners! - http://guinnpartners.com

Standby for amazing footage and great things from our partners at Cosmic Perspective - http://youtube.com/cosmicperspective

Intro and Trailer song by Everyday Astronaut "CRYO" available on Spotify! - https://open.spotify.com/track/4gsRTB85skcxkvQq4Ys43W?si=iBxyJOBYTqaMsoeou79N7Q

AND Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/us/album/cryo/1683120486?i=1683120488

--------------------------

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

All music is original! Check out my album "Maximum Aerodynamic Pressure" anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) or click here for easy links - http://everydayastronaut.com/music
